a_image.alt: Canvas Animation style mood board — Heavy Motion · Canvas API

sections.a_eyebrow: Animation · Canvas · Heavy Motion · Advanced JS · Interactive
sections.a_description: Dark stages for dynamic visuals, electric blue accents, and the developer-forward aesthetic of sites built around the HTML Canvas API — Canvas Animation design puts motion first and UI second. The dark backgrounds serve as cinema screens for particle systems, generative art, and interactive visualizations, while minimal chrome ensures nothing competes with the programmatic visual experience.

This motion-heavy style drives creative coding portfolios, interactive data visualizations, generative art galleries, and experimental web experiences. You'll see it on creative agency homepages, tech conference sites, music visualizers, and developer showcases — anywhere that the Canvas API transforms a browser window into a programmable visual playground.

a_image_cover.alt: Canvas Animation style use case illustration
Canvas Animation style use case illustration
Canvas Animation style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The sleek, developer-forward aesthetic of Canvas API animation sites — dark backgrounds serving as a stage for dynamic visual content, with minimal UI chrome letting the animation take center stage. Background: deep charcoal (#0a0a0a) that frames canvas-rendered content. The .inner panel has a translucent dark background (rgba(255,255,255,0.04)) with a subtle 1px border (rgba(255,255,255,0.08)) — the UI stays out of the way of the visual experience. Colors: electric blue (#3b82f6) as the primary accent for interactive elements and highlights. Soft white (#e2e8f0) for headings, muted gray (#94a3b8) for body text. The aesthetic suggests technical sophistication — a developer's canvas where code creates visual art. Set in Inter — the quintessential modern UI font, clean and neutral so it never competes with the animated content. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #e2e8f0. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #3b82f6. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.7, color #94a3b8. Buttons: primary — electric blue (#3b82f6), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, blue border. Alternatives: IBM Plex Sans (technical), JetBrains Mono (code-adjacent).
